driver_subject: serial: jsm: Use B0 instead of 0
kernel_subject: termbits.h: create termbits-common.h for identical bits
stage1_reason: Removal of CMSPAR ifdef due to kernel-wide architectural change (CMSPAR now defined on all architectures), plus standardization from literal 0 to B0 constant for baud rate check
stage2_reason: Kernel commit 0b46ac44f267 creates termbits-common.h for identical bits, directly addressing CMSPAR and CBAUD/B0 standardization mentioned in driver migration keywords and commit subjects.
